brand_focus: Louis Vuitton / 路易威登 (search-keyword scrape)
date_range_note: Posts filtered to instructor window March–April 2026 (see run_config time_window). Full unfiltered export backed up at module_1/data/xhs_posts_before_date_filter.json.
module_2_module_3_note: Run module_2/agent.py then module_3 with M3_TOP_N=10 for ≥10 cards. Module 2 reads latest Module 1 trend_objects.json. For ≥200 posts in-window, re-scrape March–April and re-run filter_posts_by_config.py.
